sizing_rule.note: Risk 2% of account equity per trade, divided by number of active positions. Position size scales inversely: with 1 position risk 2%, with 2 positions risk 1% each, with 3 positions risk 0.67% each. Capital allocation: units_per_instrument = (account_equity × 0.02) / (stop_loss_amount × num_positions)

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size inversely with the number of simultaneous positions held, allocating capital per unit based on a fixed risk percentage of total account equity divided by the number of active instruments.
